solutions.title: Solution
solutions.content:
$$$\frac{1}{3}$$$ of the problem is in the English statement, and the other $$$\frac{2}{3}$$$ is in the Russian statement. (This is hinted because the title of the problem in English has some Cyrillic characters, and the title of the problem in Russian has some Latin characters. These characters look identical, but if you search the text up, you'll notice the results are quite strange — because some of the characters are in a different script!)
Combining them, noting that the Russian part should go first to make sense, gives the expression $$$12a + 14ab + |a - b| + (a - 3b) b + 2$$$, which is what you should compute.
